summary: 6 changes planned. c001 (#[non_exhaustive] × 9 + docs/api/a2ui.md) and c002 (WIT @since × 5 + docs/api/kiln-abi.md) are fully independent P0s that can run in parallel. c003 (SDK 1.0.0 + MIGRATION.md) follows. c005 (Dockerfile entrypoints) is P1 with no deps. c004 (k6 annotation, staging blocked) and c006 (mint_smoke_token.sh) are last.
